emilys-banana-nut-mini-loaves-with-choco.name: Emily's Banana-nut Mini Loaves With Chocolate Chips
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spray an 8-count mini loaf pan with cooking spray.

Mix sugar, applesauce, egg, and vanilla in a large bowl with a wooden spoon. Add in bananas, walnuts, and chocolate chips and stir to combine. Add flour, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt and stir until completely mixed. Spoon batter into the prepared loaf pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick or fork inserted into the center comes out clean, 25 to 30 minutes. Allow to cool for at least 30 minutes.

escalloped-apples.name: Escalloped Apples

ingredients.prep: cored, and chopped, or more to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spray a 9x13-inch baking dish with cooking spray.

Combine brown sugar, flour, cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves together in a large bowl; add apples and toss to coat. Stir raisins, walnuts, and butter into apple mixture. Spread apple mixture evenly in prepared baking dish. Combine milk and vanilla extract together in a bowl; pour evenly over apple mixture. Cover baking dish with aluminum foil.
Bake in the preheated oven until apples are easily pierced with a fork, about 30 minutes.
Remove foil and stir apples. Bake until apples are very soft and mixture is bubbly, about 30 minutes more.

extended-children-teleculinaria.name: Extended Children

ingredients.item: Q.b.  raspa da casca de laranja

instructions: Lay the warm water and the yeast in a bowl and stir well. Lay the flour with the pinch of salt and orange shaving on the counter, mix, open a cavity in half and add the yeast, orange juice and eggs.

Knead very well until a very homogeneous dough, sprinkled with flour if necessary. Lay in a bowl sprinkled with flour, sprinkle with a little more flour, cover with a damp cloth and let it leave for 1 hour.

Remove pieces from the dough, extend them with previously wet fingers and fry them in oil until golden on both sides. Put it on a sheet of kitchen paper, then pass through a mixture of yellow sugar and cinnamon and serve.
